heading: Laws applicable to Corporation
label: 714d Laws applicable to Corporation
text: The Federal statutes applicable to Commodity Credit Corporation, a Delaware corporation, shall be applicable to the Corporation. Commodity Credit Corporation, a Delaware corporation, shall cease to be an agency of the United States as provided in .section 713(a) of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was omitted from the Code. See Codification note under former .Section 713(a) of this titlesection 713 of this title

Exceptions From Transfer of FunctionsFor exception of functions of corporations of Department of Agriculture from transfer of functions to Secretary of Agriculture by Reorg. Plan No. 2 of 1953, see Exceptions From Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 712a of this title
